lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical and electrical systems are in working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and some paint fading. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery. Mechanical components are currently functional but may require service soon.

Step into luxury with this stunning vehicle that truly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! Maintained in absolute mint condition, every detail from the gleaming exterior to the spotless interior has been meticulously cared for. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car in pristine, showroom-quality shape!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owners. The exterior is in great shape overall, showing only minor stone chips and light surface scratches typical for its age and mileage. Inside, the interior is clean and smoke-free, with some minor wear on the driver's seat bolster and common touchpoints. Mechanically, the car is reliable, runs smoothly, and has a consistent service history. All electronics, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are fully functional. This is a solid, dependable vehicle that is ready for the road with no immediate repairs needed.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as-is. While it remains a functional daily driver, it shows clear signs of age and wear that a prospective buyer should be aware of. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a couple of small door dings, and the clear coat is beginning to fade on the hood. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are solid, though the vehicle would benefit from a tune-up and new brake pads soon. The interior shows its age with some staining on the rear seats and a small tear in the driver's side bolster. All major electronics work, though the infotainment system can be sluggish at times. It is a reliable choice for someone looking for a functional car at a lower price point who doesn't mind some cosmetic and minor mechanical needs.
The car is in poor condition.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent performance. Offering a balance of sophistication and utility, it represents an outstanding acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise. Experience a vehicle that remains in commendable condition, ready for immediate service.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car! It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend adventures. It drives smoothly and has been well-loved, so you know it's got plenty of great miles left in it. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have! Shoot me a message if you want to come take a look or have any questions!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement, ensuring the chassis handles the high-revving output with precision. Equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual and a factory limited-slip differential, the drivetrain remains tight and responsive. The suspension maintains its factory-tuned balance between damping and rebound, providing exceptional turn-in. While showing minor signs of road use
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This 2017 Audi Q7 Premium Plus has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, luxurious family vehicle. The exterior finished in Orca Black Metallic retains a deep luster, with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the Nougat Brown leather interior is pristine, free of tears or odors, and features the Warm Weather package for ultimate comfort. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound; it has a complete service history from authorized dealers, including a recent brake service and a fresh set of Continental all-season tires. All electronics, including the Virtual Cockpit and Bose Surround Sound, function perfectly. It drives smoothly with the confidence of Quattro all-wheel drive, offering a balanced blend of performance and utility for its next owner.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and performance. This unit features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile, ensuring a superior driving experience. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to consistent care and remains in commendable aesthetic and structural condition. We invite discerning buyers to acquire this exceptional value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model serves as an exemplary choice for those seeking reliability without compromise. Rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting professional standards, this automobile remains in commendable condition and is prepared for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been absolute perfection. It's in great shape, super clean inside and out, and drives like a total dream! I've taken really good care of it, so it's ready to hit the road with a new owner today. You're going to love how smooth this feels—come take it for a spin!

Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and is in excellent mechanical health, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor, expected road wear that is consistent with careful, low-mileage use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with well-preserved upholstery and all electronic features functioning perfectly. We have strictly adhered to the manufacturer’s service schedule, ensuring the engine and drivetrain are in top-tier working order. It is a solid, dependable car that bridges the gap between value and premium performance, ready for immediate delivery to a discerning buyer.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. Professionally inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this offering ensures a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sophisticated engineering. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile remains in commendable condition, offering a seamless driving experience and a well-preserved interior. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an exceptional balance of value and performance.

Hey there! 👋 I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It's been such a fantastic car and is in really solid shape—perfect for zipping around town or hitting the open road. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to go whenever you are! Feel free to reach out with any questions or if you want to come take it for a spin. Can't wait to hear from you!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The engine retains its crisp throttle response thanks to factory independent throttle bodies and a meticulously maintained double-VANOS system. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to the rear wheels via a variable M differential lock. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement, and the suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing MacPherson struts up front and a multi-link rear setup for exceptional lateral grip. The exterior reflects enthusiast ownership, showing minor patina consistent with its mileage. This is a mechanically robust example of BMW’s high-revving peak, ready for the corners.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Recent service completed. No accidents.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and luxury. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor road wear one would expect from a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It drives straight, shifts smoothly, and sits on a set of tires with plenty of tread remaining. Whether you’re looking for a reliable daily driver or a sophisticated weekend cruiser, this car offers a turnkey experience for the discerning buyer.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the professional who demands both reliability and prestige. It exhibits a well-preserved aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflecting a history of attentive care. We invite you to experience the seamless performance and sophisticated interior that define this exceptional offering.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Characterized by its mechanical integrity and refined interior, the automobile has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for excellence. It offers a sophisticated driving experience for the professional who demands both reliability and distinction.

Hi everyone! Check out this awesome ride! It’s in wonderful condition and has plenty of life left in it. I've absolutely loved driving it, but it's time for someone else to enjoy. It’s super clean and runs like a dream. Come take it for a spin!

This 2011 Porsche Cayman S represents a meticulously maintained example of the 987.2 generation. Powered by the robust 3.4L DFI flat-six engine, it delivers linear power delivery through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The mid-ship architecture ensures exceptional rotational inertia and balance. This unit features the optional PASM (Porsche Active Suspension Management) for variable damping and a factory-spec limited-slip differential for optimized corner-exit traction. Recent preventative maintenance includes a full brake
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well. Recent service history included.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, having been kept in impressive condition by a dedicated owner. The exterior finish remains vibrant and smooth, showing only the minor, expected signs of light use that come with careful driving. Inside, the interior is remarkably clean and well-preserved; the seating surfaces are firm and free of significant wear, and the dashboard remains pristine with all gauges and tech features fully operational. Under the hood, the car is mechanically sound, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule. It starts up eagerly, idles quietly, and provides a smooth, confident ride on both city streets and highways. With a complete service history included, this is a turn-key vehicle ready for its next chapter, offering the peace of mind that comes from a car that has been truly looked after.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Featuring a robust drivetrain and a well-preserved interior, the unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity. An ideal selection for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.
